login.subtitle: Use your school email and password to open the portal. Demo backend: JSON Server.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Your dashboard overview, key metrics, and shortcuts to students and parents.
home.adminBlurb: Charts and metrics are on this page. Use Quick actions or the sidebar to open Users or Site settings.
home.userBlurb: Use the overview below and the sidebar (or bottom navigation on mobile) to work with students and parents.
home.noBirthdaysThisMonth: No student birthdays in the current month.
home.recentStudentsEmpty: Open a student profile from the Students page to see shortcuts here.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Overview of accounts and data stored in the system.

settings.title: Site settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your school portal. Values persist in the demo database (server/db.json).
settings.sectionGeneralHint: Public-facing name, term dates, and notices shown on the dashboard.
settings.sectionEmailPublicHint: Shown to families and used as reply targets where appropriate.
settings.sectionEmailSmtpHint: Demo placeholders only — wire your real provider in production.
settings.sectionThemeLookHint: Default look for new sessions. Users can still use their browser or OS preferences.
settings.saveFooterHint: Saves to the demo database file on the server.
settings.resetSectionGeneralHint: Restore school name, dates, announcement, etc. to defaults and save.
settings.resetSectionEmailHint: Restore contact addresses and SMTP placeholders to defaults and save.
settings.resetSectionThemeHint: Restore default brand color and interface density and save.
settings.resetAllHint: Restore every field on all tabs to defaults and save. This cannot be undone.
settings.confirmResetGeneral: Reset general settings to defaults and save now?
settings.confirmResetEmail: Reset email settings to defaults and save now?
settings.confirmResetTheme: Reset theme (color + density) to defaults and save now?
settings.confirmResetAll: Reset ALL site settings on all tabs to defaults and save now?
settings.appAppearanceHint: This is separate from the brand color above. Use this if the app still looks dark or light incorrectly. It is stored only on this device.
settings.sectionScheduleHint: Choose which weekday appears first and which days are treated as weekend (hidden from the teaching grid). At least one teaching day must remain.
settings.timetableWeekStartDayHelper: The leftmost day column in the timetable follows this rotation.
settings.timetableWeekendDaysHelper: Select up to three days to hide from the grid (e.g. Friday and Saturday).
settings.weekendMaxError: You can hide at most three days.
settings.resetSectionScheduleHint: Restore week start and weekend days to defaults and save.
settings.confirmResetSchedule: Reset schedule settings to defaults and save now?
settings.backupDbBody: This demo stores records in a single JSON file on the server. Copy its path for your backups (relative to the project root). In production, use proper database backups.
settings.sectionTagsHint: Create labels (e.g. IEP, sports) and assign them on each student profile. Deleting a tag removes it from all students.
settings.tagDeleteConfirm: Delete this tag? It will be removed from all students.

timetablePage.title: Timetable
timetablePage.subtitle: Weekly class schedule. Choose a grade and a section from the menus, then edit the grid and save. Students see a read-only view.
timetablePage.loadStudentError: Could not load your student profile
timetablePage.staffPickHint: Select a grade first; then choose a section. The section menu stays disabled until a grade is selected.
timetablePage.selectClassHint: Choose a grade and section to view or edit the weekly timetable.
timetablePage.subject: Subject
timetablePage.pickClassHint: Choose your class section to see your weekly timetable.
timetablePage.noStudentLink: Your account is not linked to a student record. Contact an administrator.
timetablePage.emptySelectionPaper: Select a grade and section to view the weekly timetable. Admins can create grades and classes under Site settings.
timetablePage.conflictBanner: Timetable conflict: at least one teacher is assigned to more than one class in the same period.
timetablePage.confirmDeleteGrade: Delete this grade? Class sections under it must be removed first.
timetablePage.confirmDeleteClass: Delete this class section? Students must be reassigned and the timetable cleared first.

gradesClassesPage.title: Grades & classes
gradesClassesPage.subtitle: Each grade groups its class sections. Add sections inside the grade they belong to.
gradesClassesPage.addGradeHint: Create a grade first, then add sections inside its card.
gradesClassesPage.noSections: No sections yet — add one below.
gradesClassesPage.noGrades: No grades yet. Add a grade above to get started.

coursesPage.title: Courses
coursesPage.subtitle: Catalog of subjects linked to timetable cells. Deleting is blocked while a course is still on a timetable.
coursesPage.empty: No courses yet. Add one above.

studentsPage.title: Students
studentsPage.subtitle: View and manage student profiles, dates of birth, and related actions.
studentsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, Emirates ID…
studentsPage.noStudentsForFilter: No students match your search or filters.
studentsPage.emptyOnboardingHint: Add students first, or set up grades and courses so classes appear in filters.

remindersPage.title: Reminders
remindersPage.subtitle: Private follow-ups and tasks for your account.
remindersPage.filterHint: Filter by due date. Reminders without a due date appear under All only.

printProfile.footer: Generated from the student management portal.

drawer.studentAddHint: Fill in the profile, then save.
drawer.studentEditHint: Update fields, then save. Manage parents and household below.
drawer.householdFormHint: Add a sibling or other household member linked to this student.

parentsPage.title: Parents
parentsPage.subtitle: Guardian and contact records linked to each student.
parentsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone…
parentsPage.emptyOnboarding: Parent records are linked to students. Add students first, then add parents here.

adminUsersPage.title: User management
adminUsersPage.subtitle: Activate or deactivate accounts, assign roles, and link student profiles.
adminUsersPage.subtitleAllAccounts: All login accounts (admins, teachers, and students) appear here. Use the filter to narrow by role.
adminUsersPage.newPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password. Minimum 4 characters.

teachersPage.title: Teachers
teachersPage.subtitle: Review teacher details, assign classes, and preview timetable load from class assignments.
teachersPage.assignClassesHint: Pick one or more class groups. The timetable below is generated from these classes and this teacher account.
teachersPage.scheduleEmpty: No timetable slots found for this teacher in selected classes.
